description_long: This is a muscular adult male figure with a bald head, standing in a wide, slightly aggressive stance. He is dressed in wrestling attire, including a pair of tight trunks with a decorative belt, knee pads, elbow pads, and high-top athletic boots. The figure's upper body is bare, showcasing defined musculature, particularly in the chest, arms, and back. The arms are slightly bent and extended outward, and the hands are relaxed. The skin tone is medium to dark, and the overall appearance suggests a professional wrestler or athlete. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: A muscular adult male in wrestling attire, standing with arms outstretched and wearing knee pads, elbow pads, and athletic boots.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muscular chest, decorative belt, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the arm, profile of the face, and the side of the boots and pads.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the broad back, rear of the trunks, and the back of the boots and pads.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the arm, side of the torso, and the profile of the face and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: wrestling trunks with decorative belt, knee pads, elbow pads, athletic boots
